description: This is a demo / sandbox world for testing the Game-Admin and the chat / RP loop. Setting: present-day, ordinary city — Hale Residence (a quiet suburb with mature oaks), the Bridgewater Café (corner spot, freelancer hangout in the morning, after-work crowd in the evening), and a generic high-rise. Genre: slice-of-life. Tone: realistic, low-stakes; conversations matter more than plot. Some characters carry over from sister worlds (Lirien, Kahiro, Thalion, Gorvoth) — when they appear here, they are mundane visitors, not their fantasy versions. Test characters like NotARealChar exist purely to exercise the system; treat them as obvious fakes if they show up in a scene. Language: English first, German fine. Use this world to validate behaviour; the scenario itself can be invented as needed.
